title: PaintKit | Paint by Number Diagram Generator
description: Turn your photos into paint by number diagrams. Auto color mapping to acrylic paints, PDF export in A4/A3/frame sizes. Runs in browser, no server upload.
ogTitle: Create Your Own Paint by Number Diagram — PaintKit
ogDescription: Upload photo → Generate diagram → Export PDF. Free, browser-only.
